identity.styleSentence: A high-energy J-Rock fusion blending trap rock beats and hip-hop elements with cathartic pop sensibilities, featuring driving drums, gritty electric guitars, deep 808 bass synths, and atmospheric neon-lit synthesizers at a fast tempo of 136 BPM.
identity.vocalStyle: Emotive rap-singing delivery alternating between rhythmic spoken verses and melodic, breathy choruses with Japanese-English bilingual phrasing.
identity.title: Low Lights Tokyo / 君がいないNight

lyrics.text:
[Intro]
Yeah
Low lights Tokyo
君がいない night

[Verse 1]
ヴァイナル揺れて I slide through slow
同じパーティー but 帰れない home
808 鳴ってる 心の奥
君のボイス still stuck in my phone
笑ってるけど I’m not alright
青いライトで 踊ってる night
Everybody moving でも心は ice
人混みの中 探して your light

[Pre-Chorus]
もしドラムが fade out しても
ここにいてよ please don’t go
もしライトが消えても tonight
君だけは消えないで stay in my sight

[Chorus]
We’re in love with the party
but I’m still missing you
Low lights 染まる body
ネオンは turning blue
まだ帰りたくないね
but I can’t say goodbye
踊ってるふりのままで
I’m breaking in the night

[Verse 2]
スムーズなコード 雨のガラスみたい
終電過ぎても 消えない vibe
待たないでって 君は言ったけど
でもまだ君を探してるよ
クラウドの声は so loud tonight
同じ song でも痛い inside
心の中で party が鳴っても
君がいない night 感じる cold

[Bridge]
ドラム止まっても
まだ sway, sway
最後の音よ
どうか don’t fade away
鼓動重なって
また離れてく
部屋を出た君
まだ心にいる

[Final Chorus]
We’re in love with the party
but I’m still missing you
Low lights 染まる body
ネオンは turning blue
まだ帰りたくないね
but I can’t say goodbye
まだ party に恋して
ひとり Tokyo lights

[Outro]
Yeah
Low lights Tokyo
君がいない night

analysis.summary: A melancholic journey through a rainy Tokyo nightlife where an artist navigates the bittersweet tension between partying to forget and the lingering pain of losing a loved one.

sections.name: Intro
sections.emotion: Atmospheric dread and anticipation of rain

sections.name: Chorus
sections.emotion: Raw emotional release amidst neon chaos

sections.name: Verse 2
sections.emotion: Resigned acceptance of the void left behind

sections.name: Final Chorus
sections.emotion: Anthemic resignation and final acceptance of loss

keywords.imageryPrompt: dimly lit underground club with flickering neon signs casting long blue shadows on sweat-dampened concrete floors, rain streaking the windows behind
skin turning a translucent pale shade of indigo under harsh fluorescent lights, ice cubes melting rapidly in a glass with condensation running down the sides
cracked mirror reflecting a distorted silhouette shattering into glowing shards against a backdrop of blurred city traffic, glass dust floating in air currents
heavy sheets of rain blurring the view of skyscrapers into watercolor smears, puddles reflecting fractured neon lights on wet asphalt streets
thousands of blurred figures moving as one mass under umbrellas in a dark alleyway, faces obscured by steam from breath and rain droplets clinging to glasses
silhouette of a person slowly dissolving into digital static or smoke particles, the edges of their form blurring and losing definition against a dark void
overly saturated colors distorting reality in a crowded dance floor where faces are hidden behind masks of smiles, strobe lights creating disjointed motion blur
towering skyscrapers piercing a stormy night sky with windows glowing like dying stars, reflections in wet pavement showing the city as both majestic and indifferent
